_comment: Site-wide flags. zhPublished is a PER-PAGE map (keyed by i18nKey) gating each Simplified-Chinese /zh/ page independently. For a page whose flag is false (DRAFT): its /zh/ page is noindex, no hreflang is emitted on either side of the pair, the /zh/ url stays out of sitemap.xml, and no language toggle renders. For a page whose flag is true (PUBLISHED): its /zh/ page drops noindex, the EN+/zh/ pair carries reciprocal hreflang (en/zh-Hans/x-default), the /zh/ url is listed in sitemap.xml with per-pair xhtml:link alternates, and the navbar language toggle renders. index + competition were published in Phase 1d; workshop + contact were published in Phase 2c (their drafts shipped in Phase 2b); register shipped published in both locales — all five /zh/ pages are now live. Flip a flag back to false to return that page to a draft. Consumed by src/_data/eleventyComputed.js (zhNoindex/hreflangAlternates/localeToggle) and src/sitemap.njk.
_commentGsc: Additive, order-independent list of Google Search Console HTML-tag verification tokens — one per verifying owner. Rendered as Google site-verification <meta> tags (by src/_includes/layouts/base.njk) on pages whose front matter sets siteVerification: true (currently index, competition, workshop). Add a token to register a new owner; never remove an existing one or you un-verify that owner.
